items.name: Mini Banquet (for 2 only)
items.description: Recommended for first-time couples. Mixed entree: chicken dumplings, charcoal clay oven chicken, crispy beetroot patties. Mains: slow cooked lamb, butter chicken. Sides: eggplant, fragrant basmati rice, freshly baked roti.

items.name: Chef's Banquet
items.description: Minimum 4 people. Mixed entree: chicken dumplings, crispy beetroot patties, clay oven Portobello mushrooms, tareko machha. Mains (choice of 4): charcoal clay oven pork cutlets or clay oven chicken, clay oven vegetables, barramundi curry, goat on the bone, butter chicken, seasonal mix vegetables. Sides + dessert.

items.name: Himalayan Banquet
items.description: Minimum 4 people. Mixed entree: chicken dumplings, charcoal clay oven chicken, white-eyed bean patties, crispy beetroot patties. Mains: butter chicken, king prawns, slow cooked lamb. Sides included.

items.name: Vegetarian Banquet
items.description: Minimum 4 people. Vegan option available. Mixed entree: vegetarian dumplings, crispy beetroot patties, clay oven Portobello mushrooms, white-eyed bean & spinach patties. Mains: clay oven vegetables, chef's special eggplant curry, nine-bean lentils with bok choy. Sides included.

items.name: Momo (6 pcs)
items.description: Popular steamed chicken or vegetable dumplings with tomato achar.

items.name: Phulaura
items.description: White-eyed beans, spinach, spring onion patties with minted yogurt. Vegan option available.

items.name: Sekuwa
items.description: Chicken thigh fillet marinated in roasted cumin, szechwan & cooked in the charcoal clay oven.

items.name: Chef's King Prawns
items.description: Chef's special prawn lightly spiced with tamarind sauce, salt & pepper.

items.name: Tareko Machha
items.description: Chef's special fried barramundi spiced with lemon juice, curry leaf powder, Nepalese spices.

items.name: Samosha
items.description: Home made pastry triangles stuffed with curried potatoes & peas with minted yogurt.

items.name: Beetroot Patties
items.description: A popular street gem with an Aussie twist, prepared from beetroot, cheese & spring onion.

items.name: Clay-oven Mushroom
items.description: Portobello mushroom marinated in ground mustard & spices served with edamame beans.

items.name: Vegetarians Rejoice
items.description: A great combination of momo, beetroot patty, phulaura, clay-oven mushroom with tomato achar & minted yogurt. Vegan option available.

items.name: Taste of Nepal Platter
items.description: A great combination of sekuwa, chicken momo, beetroot patty, phulaura with tomato achar & minted yoghurt.

items.name: Herb Roti Platter
items.description: A trio of chef's special dips served with freshly baked herb bread. Vegan option available.

items.name: Pork Cutlets
items.description: Delicious pork cutlets cooked in chef's special marinade & served with tamarind sauce.

items.name: Poleko Khasi
items.description: Signature juicy lamb cutlets served with minted yoghurt, baby potatoes & roasted capsicum.

items.name: Sekuwa (as a main)
items.description: Chicken thigh fillet marinated in cumin & szechwan served with baby potatoes & roasted capsicum.

items.name: Clay Oven Barra
items.description: Lightly marinated barramundi fillet delicately cooked & served with citrus sauce & fresh herbs.

items.name: Goat on the Bone
items.description: Exquisite village style slow cooked goat with fenugreek, cinnamon, nutmeg, bay leaves, ginger & garlic.

items.name: Lamb Curry
items.description: Exquisite village style slow cooked curry of lamb enriched with cardamom, cinnamon, coriander & bay leaves.

items.name: Butter Chicken
items.description: Boneless chicken smoked in clay oven & then simmered in a sauce of tomato, garlic, star anise & szechwan pepper.

items.name: Kukhura Ko Masu
items.description: Chef Nil's special traditional country style chicken curry prepared in aromatic Nepali spices.

items.name: Wild Buffalo Special
items.description: Wild water buffalo loin cubes slow braised & then stir-fried with seasonal vegetables & home ground spices.

items.name: Machha Tarkari
items.description: Aromatic barramundi curry delicately cooked in a sauce of onion, tomatoes, coconut milk & special house spice blend.

items.name: Piro Jhingey
items.description: King prawns, pan-fried with vegetables, flavored with lemon juice & a hint of chilli.

items.name: Jhingey Ko Tarkari
items.description: Chef Nil's popular king prawn dish cooked in a sauce of coconut milk, ginger & fresh curry leaves.

items.name: Chef's Special Eggplant
items.description: Chef Nil's signature oven roasted eggplant dish slow cooked in a sauce of tomato, onion & garlic topped with home-made yoghurt and herbs. Vegan option available.

items.name: Clay Oven Vegetables
items.description: Halloumi cheese, broccoli, beetroot, portobello mushroom cooked in clay oven & served on a bed of baby spinach. Vegan option available.

items.name: Misayako Tarkari
items.description: Seasonal vegetables tossed in a pan with home ground spices.

items.name: Laukako Tarkari
items.description: Chef Nil's special spiced long melon dumplings cooked in a creamy sauce of tomato, ginger, garlic & onion. Vegan option available.

items.name: Kwati
items.description: A goodness of nine different beans cooked with tomato, onion, garlic, ginger & bok choy.

items.name: Pulau Rice
items.description: An aged long-grain rice, topped with candied onion, green peas, toasted cumin seeds, slivered almonds.

items.name: Steamed Basmati Rice
items.description: Fragrant basmati rice.

items.name: Saag
items.description: Stir-fried seasonal spinach, olive oil, chilli & cumin seed.

items.name: Bhuteko Vunta
items.description: Eggplant cooked with onion, capsicum & enriched with round mustard & fennel seeds.

items.name: Jhaneko Daal
items.description: Lentils cooked in traditional style with Himalayan herb Jimbu.

items.name: Garden Salad
items.description: Salad prepared from cherry tomatoes, baby spinach & strawberries enriched with Nepali style lemon & olive oil dressing.

items.name: Dahima (Yoghurt Salad)
items.description: A real refresher, salad made with roasted cumin, mint, cucumber & homemade yoghurt.

items.name: Roti
items.description: Freshly baked plain bread.

items.name: Garlic Roti
items.description: Freshly baked garlic bread.

items.name: Cheese Roti
items.description: Bread stuffed with cheese, garlic, onion & coriander.

items.name: Roti Basket (min 4 people)
items.description: A combination of the breads above.
